name: frontend
author: LOLPicker
description: Desktop app for League of Legends champion picking

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "cross-env ELECTRON=true vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:electron: tsc -b && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: tsc -b && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: tsc -b && cross-env ELECTRON=true vite build && electron-builder --mac
